repo_state: local bare repository with main branch
notes: copies the requested local ref objects, prints the same fetched object id/ref output as stock Git and leaves fetched contents readable

repo_state: local bare repository with two commits
notes: directory positional surface connects to the requested local repository and matches stock fetch-pack output and side effects

repo_state: local bare repository with two commits
notes: ref positional surface requests the branch and matches stock fetch-pack output and side effects

repo_state: local bare repository with main branch
notes: accepts thin-pack negotiation with no progress output, matches stock stdout and leaves fetched contents readable

combination: explicit branch ref with annotated tag
repo_state: local bare repository with annotated tag
notes: copies the annotated tag object reachable from the requested branch and matches stock tag object contents

repo_state: local bare repository with annotated tag on tip
notes: depth-limited fetch-pack includes the annotated tag object, writes stock-shaped shallow state and omits the fetched commit parent

repo_state: local bare repository with nested annotated tag objects
notes: depth-limited include-tag fetch-pack copies both direct and nested annotated tag objects like stock Git

repo_state: local bare repository with two commits
notes: depth-one fetch-pack matches stock stdout, writes matching .git/shallow state, fetches the tip contents and omits the parent commit
